title: Admin Debug-/Feedback-Menü
summary: Rebased v014 als neues v022-Update gegen aktuellen main/v021: ergänzt ein Admin-Debug-Menü. Tablet: Debug-Einstieg in der Seitenleiste/Scan-Hub. Handy: Admin-Konfig, QR/Sync und Übungsdatenbank teilen liegen hinter einem Admin-Menü.
testPlan: Tablet width >=760px: Debug button appears in scan/admin rail; tablet core layout/breakpoints unchanged.
Phone width <760px: Admin-Menü button appears; Admin-Konfig, QR/Sync and Übungsdatenbank teilen are reachable through the menu.
Open Debug menu and press Diagnose aktualisieren.
Press Bericht kopieren and verify clipboard/report text contains version/features/layout/sourceTruth.
Verify QR / Sync, Admin-Konfig and Übungsdatenbank teilen actions still open their existing dialogs.
Verify normal scan camera, gallery QR decode, QR generation, parser, storage and plan state still behave as before.
riskNotes: Rebased from uploaded v014 package because main is already at v021.
Only update-inbox/patch.py and update-inbox/release.json are uploaded; __pycache__ and reports are excluded.
Phone CSS hides original admin action buttons behind the Admin-Menü but does not delete their existing handlers.
No API keys or secrets are embedded.
